Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 157 upvotes, 13 comments
  2. The Social Smolnet 99 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Attention Residuals 90 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. Meme Buildings 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Show HN: Baltic shadow fleet tracker – live AIS, cable proximity alerts 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Work_mem: It's a Trap 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 700 upvotes, 240 comments
  9. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 479 upvotes, 163 comments
  10. Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis 30 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 143 upvotes, 52 comments
  12. Regex Blaster 140 upvotes, 52 comments
  13. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 166 upvotes, 65 comments
  14. Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot 297 upvotes, 128 comments
  15. Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 92 upvotes, 35 comments
  16. OpenCode – The open source AI coding agent 218 upvotes, 97 comments
  17. VisiCalc Reconstructed 148 upvotes, 63 comments
  18. FSF statement on copyright infringement lawsuit Bartz v. Anthropic 246 upvotes, 123 comments
  19. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 265 upvotes, 145 comments
  20. Heart Attack and Stroke Risk Jumps When People Stop Taking GLP-1s 28 upvotes, 11 comments
  21. We rewrote our Rust WASM Parser in TypeScript – and it got 3x Faster 30 upvotes, 13 comments
  22. Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser 33 upvotes, 17 comments
  23. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 39 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. Ghostling 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 423 upvotes, 363 comments
  26. Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility 31 upvotes, 20 comments
  27. A Japanese Glossary of Chopsticks Faux Pas 73 upvotes, 60 comments
  28. I love my dumb watches 13 upvotes, 8 comments
  29. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 16 upvotes, 14 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 270 upvotes, 459 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
